title: Monday.com automation to add in a Slack Channel a new Member
excerpt: Is there a way to add a new Member in a Slack Channel triggered by a Monday.com subitem in the automation when the subitem Status is at Done?

posts.author: KarimNahas (Nahas)
posts.cookedHtml: Is there a way to add a new Member in a Slack Channel triggered by a Monday.com subitem in the automation when the subitem Status is at Done?

posts.author: malia.monday (Malia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there! Adding a member to a Slack Channel is not a support action with our Slack integration.

I love the idea though and our product team is eager for this kind of feedback to include in their discussions for future improvement. This feedback can be submitted directly to a dedicated section of our community page. Learn more here

posts.author: sachinkarma (sachin kumar karma)
